name: elevator-music
description: Elevator hold music while your AI agent works — because watching it grind is boring. A ding when it's done is just a bonus. VS Code & Cursor.

commands.title: Elevator Music: Mark Last Turn Missed

elevatorMusic.enabled.markdownDescription:
Play sounds when agent activity is detected.

**Stuck hold music?** Run [Stop Hold Music](command:elevatorMusic.stopMusic) from the Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`) or use the status bar menu.

elevatorMusic.advancedMode.description: Use agent hooks for guaranteed hold music and ding (requires VS Code 1.109+ or Cursor).

elevatorMusic.installHooksForAllEditors.description: When enabling Advanced Mode, install hooks for both VS Code and Cursor. Default: only the editor you are using now. Enable this if both IDEs run on the same machine.

elevatorMusic.terminalFallback.description: Use terminal completion events (with edit-burst heuristic) as a ding fallback.

elevatorMusic.dingCooldownMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between dings from any source.

elevatorMusic.editBurstWindowMs.description: Sliding window for detecting multi-file edit bursts before terminal-end dings.

elevatorMusic.editBurstMinDocuments.description: Minimum distinct documents edited in the burst window to qualify terminal-end ding.

elevatorMusic.editBurstMinEvents.description: Alternative burst threshold: minimum total edit events in the window.

elevatorMusic.port.description: Localhost port for Advanced Mode hook bridge.

elevatorMusic.dingPath.description: Custom path to ding WAV. Empty uses bundled default.

elevatorMusic.holdMusicPath.description: Custom path to hold-music WAV. Empty uses bundled default.

elevatorMusic.playOnSubagents.description: Advanced Mode: track subagent start/stop for hold music ref counting.

elevatorMusic.maxHoldMinutes.markdownDescription:
Automatically stop hold music after this many minutes (0 = no limit). Useful if a stop hook is missed on very long agent runs.

**Manual stop:** [Stop Hold Music](command:elevatorMusic.stopMusic)

languageModelTools.name: elevator-music_notifyTaskComplete
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this when you have finished responding to the user's request and are returning control to them. Plays a short completion sound. Call once per completed turn.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Play a completion ding when the agent finishes a turn.

languageModelTools.name: elevator-music_notifyTaskStarting
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this when you are about to start work that may take a while, such as running tests, multi-file edits, or package installs. Starts hold music until the task completes.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Start hold music when beginning a longer task.
